################################################################################
# batch_ar.txt — render C1->C2 drain (render campaign batch 2 of 2 — FINAL)
#
# Generated by the discover-c1-batch skill, 2026-06-03.
# Work type:    promote-c2 (C1 -> C2 mechanical promotion). AUTHOR-ONLY fanout.
# Sessions:     6  (Mashed_pool1,9,11,13,14,15 pre-assigned)
#               -> pool0,4,5,6 SKIPPED: leaked in-JVM locks (older fanouts).
#               -> pool7,8 SKIPPED: POISONED during batch_an.
#               -> pool2 SKIPPED: poisoned (ao_s2 real LockException).
#               -> pool3, pool10, pool12 SKIPPED (NEW): REAL LockExceptions at
#                  the FLAT location during batch_aq (s2/s4/s5) — in-JVM leaked
#                  locks; do NOT re-assign without re-verification.
#               -> pool11/13/14 PROMOTED into the assignment: each opened
#                  read-only cleanly as a batch_aq fallback. They may carry
#                  stray on-disk .lock files (incl. one left by aq_s4's failed
#                  pool13 attempt) — stale on-disk locks are TOLERABLE; fall
#                  back only on a REAL LockException.
# Total RVAs:   302  (ALL remaining render-C1 rows: 0x004e8030..0x005cb42b)
# Model:        Opus 4.8 (1M context)  (claude-opus-4-8[1m])
#               -> promote-c2 bulk-drain cap 60 RVAs/session (this batch:
#                  51/51/50/50/50/50 — the user-approved 60-cap lets the whole
#                  remaining render pool drain in ONE batch).
#               Same author-only cadence as batch_aj..aq.
#
# CAMPAIGN CONTEXT: batch_aq (render 1/2, the first-156: 0x401690-0x4e7fa0) came
# back 3 plates / 153 library_skip[renderware] (98%). This batch takes ALL 302
# remaining render-C1 rows. After this slice render C1 = 0 and the render
# campaign CLOSES — leaving only 8 straggler C1 rows project-wide (util 3,
# unknown 2, boot/io/save 1 each) outside the third-party-library residue.
#
# *** READ THIS — EXPECT DOMINANT library_skip AGAIN; THE TAGS NOW VARY. ***
# The whole batch sits in 0x004e8030..0x005cb42b — deep library territory.
# Evidence already on file, slice by slice:
#   * s1 (0x004e8xxx-0x0050cxxx): RW core RpGeometry/stream continuation —
#     ao_s2 already reclassed the neighbouring 004e8e90/004e8ea0 refcount trio;
#     aq_s1 confirmed 004dc5b0's callers FUN_004ea9a0/004f13d0/004f1b00 (s1
#     candidates' band) are the RW d3d9 driver. NEW WATCH: the odd-aligned
#     cluster 004fcac3,00500c48,005010f1..0050c897 (addresses NOT 0x10-aligned)
#     starts just past the D3DX9-PSGP calibrated band end (0x4fc9e0) — these
#     are LIKELY D3DX9 static-link residue beyond the calibrated band. If
#     FidDB-named or D3DX-shaped, tag library_skip=<rva>:d3dx9 (a NEW tag is
#     fine; central re-classify handles it).
#   * s2 (0x0050d-0x00538): more odd-aligned 0x0050exxx-0x005112c9 (same D3DX9
#     watch) + the PTank/Im2D particle band — ao_s2 confirmed PTank
#     00534b60/00534d00 vendored renderware.
#   * s3/s4 (0x00538-0x00549): RW toolkit pages; 0x00546xxx is the math library
#     ap_s1/s2 repeatedly cited as vendored-band callees (FUN_00546b10
#     matrix->quat, FUN_00546d10).
#   * s5 (0x00549-0x00551): RW toolkit band (skin/morph/BinMesh-shaped).
#   * s6 (0x00551-0x005cb): 00553c50..00553ef0 sit DIRECTLY BELOW the hud
#     font-vector module 0x00554010 (ao_s2 reclassed gameplay->hud with
#     module-vendor-doubt) — if these decode as the same font/path toolkit,
#     subsystem_observed=hud is acceptable (plate) OR library_skip if
#     library-confirmed; 005584c0/00558df0/0055ac00..0055b650/00561ee0 are
#     RW-Physics-band neighbours (tag RenderWare-Physics-3.7 if confirmed);
#     0057bf30..0057c550 end 0x60 below the qhull island 0x0057c5b0 — batch_ak
#     already reclassed 0057c220/300/500 to RW-Physics; watch qh_*-shapes
#     (tag qhull-2002.1); 005cb404/005cb42b neighbour the batch_ai-confirmed
#     renderware V3dTransform trio at 005cb000/07f/0ef.
# CONSEQUENCE: plated count may be tiny (aq: 3/156). That is a SUCCESS — every
# candidate leaves render C1 either way and the campaign closes. Do NOT
# force-plate vendored code. BUT genuine game render glue may hide here —
# the per-RVA library-confirm rule decides, never the address.
#
# HOW TO DECIDE per RVA (library-confirm rule — apply it AGGRESSIVELY):
#   - If the function decodes as a named RenderWare/D3DX9/CRT/qhull primitive,
#     OR Ghidra shows a "Library Function: <sym>" tag, OR it is an obvious thin
#     engine primitive with NO game-state read/write — RW idioms:
#       * engine fn-table DAT_007d3ff8 (+0x108/+0x10c/+0x110/+0x114/+0x118/
#         +0x11c) with 0x3xxxx/0x4xxxx memhints,
#       * plugin-offset globals DAT_007d7xxx, module lists &DAT_00617xxx/
#         &DAT_00618xxx, RW error idiom FUN_004d7ff0+FUN_004d8480,
#       * RW 3.5-3.7 stream version window (0x35000..0x37002),
#       * struct layouts byte-exact vs vendored gta-reversed RW headers,
#       * D3DX9: SSE/SSE2/3DNow! dispatch shapes, PSGP-style aligned/unaligned
#         dual paths, no RW or game globals:
#       -> do NOT plate it. Queue-row field `library_skip=<rva>:<tag>`
#          (tag = renderware | RenderWare-Physics-3.7 | d3dx9 | msvc-crt |
#          qhull-2002.1). Do NOT rename on master. Central re-classify
#          reclasses to third-party-library[<tag>], kept C1.
#   - Only GENUINE game/engine-GLUE that reads/writes game state (0x006xxxxx-
#     0x009xxxxx game globals, entity pools, application-page callers passing
#     game data) goes in `rvas=` for the C1->C2 plate. When in doubt, PLATE it
#     C1->C2 with subsystem_observed + a bare [UNCERTAIN] — do NOT silently
#     drop it.
#   - subsystem_observed: plated rows default render; honor the decomp
#     (hud/frontend/gameplay reclass with evidence is welcome).
#
# Pre-flight (verified at generation time, 2026-06-03):
#   * re/SCRIBE_QUEUE.md Queued = EMPTY. batch_aq fully swept + re-classified
#     (sweep-20260603-2220: 3 plates + 1 master function_create; re-classify
#     05e7a2e1). render C1 458 -> 302. SAFE to fan out.
#   * Calibrated-band screen over all 302: ZERO inside CRT / D3DX9-PSGP /
#     qhull calibrated bands (s1/s2's odd-aligned cluster starts just PAST the
#     PSGP band end — hence the d3dx9 watch above, per-RVA confirm needed).
#
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# AUTHOR-ONLY PROTOCOL (read before any session runs) — identical to batch_aj..aq
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#   * DO write per-RVA .md plates into the session's bucket dir, using the
#     template heading **`## Mechanical description`** (NOT `## Purpose`).
#   * DO append ONE row to a PER-SESSION queue fragment:
#         re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s<N>.md   (NOT the shared re/SCRIBE_QUEUE.md)
#     The queued row MUST use **`rvas=`** for plated RVAs (or `rvas=NONE` if
#     zero — aq precedent) and a SEPARATE `library_skip=<rva>:<tag>,...` field.
#   * DO NOT write hooks.csv / STUBS.md / UNCERTAINTIES.md / DEFERRED.md /
#     re/SCRIBE_QUEUE.md. DO NOT run re-classify.
#   * DO NOT mutate the master Ghidra project. Read-only MCP only. If an RVA
#     has no function object, plate from the raw listing and set
#     needs_function_create=<rva> in the queue row (sweep creates it — aq_s1's
#     004492b0 precedent).
#   * DO NOT mint U-IDs or S-IDs. Bare `[UNCERTAIN]` markers only; central
#     re-classify mints from the reserved range (this batch: U-9200..U-9499,
#     S-7200..S-7399).
#   * Each session reads ONLY its pre-assigned pool clone (read-only). One
#     atomic path-scoped commit at end (plates + fragment):
#         "scribe(batch_ar s<N>): author <K> C1->C2 plates for render <range>"
#     `git commit -- <your bucket dir> <your fragment>` — NEVER `git add -A`.
#
# DUPLICATE-INSTANCE GUARD (memory feedback_parallel_fanout_gotchas #7):
#   Before doing ANY work, check whether your bucket dir / fragment / pool
#   marker already exists. If so, STOP and yield (git restore, never blind-rm).
#
# FUZZY-GREP GOTCHA: confirm each candidate's OWN hooks.csv row with an
#   ANCHORED grep `^<rva>,` (naive grep fuzzy-matches notes-column citations).
#
# POOL .gpr LOCATION GOTCHA (ap_s3/ap_s4): pool .gpr files live FLAT in
#   `mashed_pool\` (project_location = mashed_pool dir root, project_name =
#   Mashed_pool<N>). The nested per-slot path throws a misleading
#   LockException/NotFoundException. Also: a malformed program_open MISSING
#   program_name can itself poison the slot in-JVM (aq_s2/aq_s4 incident) —
#   always pass program_name="MASHED.exe" on the FIRST open attempt.
#
# FOLLOW-UP (single Opus session on main, AFTER all 6 commit — do NOT run now):
#   Scripted ghidra-sweep:
#     1. py -3.12 scripts/sweep_build_manifest.py --rows re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s1.md
#        ... re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s6.md --out sweep_manifest.json --date <D> --level C2
#     2. ghidra_eval apply via scripts/ghidra/sweep_apply_eval.py (one txn);
#        master function_create first for any needs_function_create rows.
#     3. Central re-classify on main: C1->C2 for plated; honor
#        subsystem_observed; reclass-OUT library_skip to third-party-library[<tag>]
#        kept-C1; mint U-/S- from reserved ranges. render C1 -> 0 — RENDER
#        CAMPAIGN CLOSES. Then: only 8 straggler C1 rows remain (util 3,
#        unknown 2, boot/io/save 1) — plan a single mop-up session, then the
#        C2->C3 promotion phase resumes.
#
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# POOL-SLOT HYGIENE (every session)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#   export POOL_SLOT_FILE=".pool_slot_ar_s<N>"      # per-session marker
#   Use the PRE-ASSIGNED Mashed_pool<S> clone directly (do NOT acquire).
#   pool0/2/3/4/5/6/7/8/10/12 are SKIPPED-poisoned. On a REAL LockException at
#   the FLAT location, fall back to any other non-poisoned clone and record the
#   ACTUAL slot in the queue row. ALWAYS program_close at end.
#
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SUBSYSTEM HINT (not a claim)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#   Working hypothesis for all 302: render (their current hooks.csv label).
#   EXPECT the dominant share vendored (renderware; d3dx9 odd-aligned cluster;
#   RW-Physics-3.7 + qhull fringes in s6) and a small share of genuine game
#   render/hud glue. CONFIRM per RVA from decomp; record subsystem_observed /
#   library_skip in the queue row.
################################################################################


================================================================================
Session 1 — bucket_render_004e8030_0050c897  (promote-c2, 51-RVA drain)
================================================================================

Pool slot:   Mashed_pool1 (pre-assigned — do NOT acquire)
Model:       Opus 4.8 (1M context) (claude-opus-4-8[1m]) — promote-c2 cap 60 (this session: 51)
Skill used:  parallel-fanout promote-c2  (AUTHOR-ONLY)
Bucket dir:  re/analysis/bucket_render_004e8030_0050c897/
Drains to:   re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s1.md  (per-session fragment; sweep merges later)

# Mission
First slice: the RW core RpGeometry/RpWorld stream/plugin tail (0x004e8030..
0x004ebc30 — page neighbours of ao_s2's reclassed refcount trio and of aq_s4/s6
families) + the odd-aligned 0x004fcac3..0x0050c897 cluster (the d3dx9 watch —
addresses just past the PSGP calibrated band; if FidDB-named or D3DX-shaped,
library_skip=<rva>:d3dx9). Apply the library-confirm rule per RVA; plate only
genuine game/engine-glue C1->C2.

# Inputs
- Existing C1 plate per RVA: read the path in that RVA's hooks.csv `file` column
  FIRST (anchored `^<rva>,` grep). Deepen, don't restart. Drift-skip any >= C2.
- Cross-reference: aq_s3..s6 fragments (re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_aq_s*.md) for the
  RW-core idiom lists; memory project_d3dx9_psgp_band for the D3DX9 dispatch
  shapes.

# Workflow
1. DUPLICATE-INSTANCE GUARD (header). Then export POOL_SLOT_FILE=".pool_slot_ar_s1";
   use Mashed_pool1 read-only (FLAT mashed_pool\ location, program_name="MASHED.exe").
2. For each RVA: function_at -> decomp_function (-> listing_code_unit_at if no fn;
   set needs_function_create=<rva> in the queue row if no function object).
3. Apply the library-confirm rule. Genuine-glue RVA -> write
   re/analysis/bucket_render_004e8030_0050c897/<rva>.md with frontmatter
   (rva, name, size_bytes, confidence_target=C2, callees_depth1, callers_noted,
   opened_in_slot, session_date=2026-06-03) + "## Mechanical description" +
   "## Constants" + "## Uncertainties" (bare [UNCERTAIN]) + "## Stubs
   encountered". Vendored RVA -> library_skip=<rva>:<tag> in the queue row.
4. Append ONE row to re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s1.md: date, ar_s1, bucket, rvas=<csv of
   PLATED only, or NONE>, confidence=C1->C2, note=<subsystem_observed +
   library_skip + needs_function_create + actual pool slot>.
5. One atomic path-scoped commit: "scribe(batch_ar s1): author <K> C1->C2 plates
   for render 004e8030_0050c897".

# Candidates (51)
004e8030,004e8090,004e80c0,004e80f0,004e8120,004e8400,004e8440,004e8640,004e8750,004e8910,004e8940,004e89a0,004e89e0,004e8a10,004e8c70,004e8f50,004e8f80,004e8fb0,004e8fd0,004e9010,004e9080,004e9330,004e9850,004e98d0,004e9910,004e9950,004e99b0,004e9e40,004ea220,004ea9a0,004eb3c0,004eb9d0,004eb9e0,004eba40,004ebb00,004ebc30,004fcac3,00500c48,005010f1,00501ce4,0050272a,00502e9e,005033f4,00503a3a,00504008,0050570a,0050706f,00508772,0050a41e,0050b6ff,0050c897

# STOP-AND-ASK if
- function_at AND listing_code_unit_at both null — surface + skip.
- An RVA decodes as a library family — note in plate-or-queue, do NOT rename; set
  subsystem_observed=third-party-library[...] + library_skip=<rva>:<tag>.

Pool slot:   Mashed_pool9 (pre-assigned — do NOT acquire)
Model:       Opus 4.8 (1M context) (claude-opus-4-8[1m]) — promote-c2 cap 60 (this session: 51)

Bucket dir:  re/analysis/bucket_render_0050d089_00538c80/
Drains to:   re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s2.md

# Mission
Second slice: the remaining odd-aligned 0x0050dxxx-0x005112c9 rows (same d3dx9
watch as s1) + the 0x0052d-0x00538 PTank/Im2D particle band (ao_s2 confirmed
PTank 00534b60/00534d00 vendored renderware; these are its page-mates). EXPECT
heavy library_skip. Apply the library-confirm rule per RVA.

# Workflow
Identical to Session 1, but POOL_SLOT_FILE=".pool_slot_ar_s2", Mashed_pool9,
bucket dir bucket_render_0050d089_00538c80/, queue fragment
re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s2.md, commit "scribe(batch_ar s2): author <K> C1->C2 plates
for render 0050d089_00538c80".

# Candidates (51)

             Fall back only on a REAL LockException.)

small-function runs 0x0053dxxx-0x0053fxxx — accessor/iterator shapes likely).
EXPECT heavy library_skip[renderware]. Apply the library-confirm rule per RVA;
plate only genuine game/engine-glue C1->C2.

Session 4 — bucket_render_00540260_00549620  (promote-c2, 50-RVA drain)

             files EXPECTED (incl. one left by aq_s4's failed attempt) — pool13
             opened read-only cleanly for aq_s2. Fall back only on a REAL
             LockException.)

# Mission
Fourth slice (0x00540260-0x00549620): the 0x00543xxx dense run + the 0x00546xxx
math-library page (ap_s1/s2 cited FUN_00546b10 matrix->quat and FUN_00546d10
as vendored-band callees — 00546bf0/00546c50/00546cb0/00546d10 are candidates
here). EXPECT heavy library_skip[renderware]. Apply the library-confirm rule
per RVA; plate only genuine game/engine-glue C1->C2.

library_skip[renderware]. Apply the library-confirm rule per RVA; plate only

================================================================================
Session 6 — bucket_render_00551840_005cb42b  (promote-c2, 50-RVA drain)
================================================================================

Pool slot:   Mashed_pool15 (pre-assigned — do NOT acquire)
Model:       Opus 4.8 (1M context) (claude-opus-4-8[1m]) — promote-c2 cap 60 (this session: 50)
Skill used:  parallel-fanout promote-c2  (AUTHOR-ONLY)
Bucket dir:  re/analysis/bucket_render_00551840_005cb42b/
Drains to:   re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s6.md

# Mission
Sixth/last slice — the scattered tail that CLOSES the render campaign. Mixed
territory, FOUR watches:
  (a) 00553c50..00553ef0 sit directly below the hud font-vector module at
      0x00554010 (ao_s2: gameplay->hud, module-vendor-doubt) — if they decode
      as the same font/path toolkit, plate with subsystem_observed=hud (or
      library_skip if library-confirmed; cite the ao_s2 module-doubt either way).
  (b) 005584c0/00558df0/0055ac00/0055ac50/0055ad30/0055b650/00561ee0 are
      RW-Physics-band neighbours (ao_s3/s4 reclassed their page-mates) — tag
      RenderWare-Physics-3.7 if confirmed.
  (c) 0057bf30..0057c550 end 0x60 below the qhull island (0x0057c5b0);
      batch_ak already reclassed 0057c220/300/500 -> RW-Physics; watch
      qh_*-shapes (tag qhull-2002.1).
  (d) 005cb404/005cb42b neighbour the batch_ai renderware V3dTransform trio
      (005cb000/07f/0ef).
Apply the library-confirm rule per RVA; plate only genuine game/engine-glue.

# Workflow
Identical pattern. POOL_SLOT_FILE=".pool_slot_ar_s6", Mashed_pool15, bucket dir
bucket_render_00551840_005cb42b/, queue fragment re/SCRIBE_QUEUE_ar_s6.md,
commit "scribe(batch_ar s6): author <K> C1->C2 plates for render 00551840_005cb42b".

# Candidates (50)
00551840,00551a50,00551ad0,00551c40,00551ca0,00551ce0,00551cf0,00551d40,00551fd0,00551fe0,00552020,00552230,005522e0,005524a0,00552720,00552890,00552920,00552fa0,00553030,005530f0,005531f0,005533d0,00553590,00553620,005538a0,00553c50,00553cf0,00553e00,00553e80,00553ef0,005578a0,005584c0,00558df0,0055ac00,0055ac50,0055ad30,0055b650,00561ee0,0057bf30,0057c0d0,0057c1b0,0057c210,0057c270,0057c2b0,0057c370,0057c420,0057c440,0057c550,005cb404,005cb42b

# STOP-AND-ASK: same as Session 1.


################################################################################
# END batch_ar.txt — 302 RVAs across 6 author-only sessions (render campaign
# 2/2 — FINAL; 60-cap shape: 51/51/50/50/50/50). After all 6 commit: run the
# scripted ghidra-sweep on main (see header), then central re-classify C1->C2 +
# reclass-OUT every library_skip RVA (kept-C1). render C1 302 -> 0 — the RENDER
# CAMPAIGN CLOSES. Project-wide non-library C1 then = 8 stragglers (util 3,
# unknown 2, boot/io/save 1 each) — one mop-up session, then the C2->C3
# promotion phase resumes with a ~4389-row C2 pool.
################################################################################
